content.thinking:
The user wants me to fix multiple configuration issues in a Kubernetes Spark environment. Let me apply the three fixes described:

1. Fix History Server PVC reference (wrong PVC name)
2. Fix History Server log directory (wrong path)
3. Fix Team A RoleBinding namespace (wrong namespace in subjects)

Let me run the diagnostic commands first to understand the current state, then apply the fixes.

content.text: I'll start by checking the current state of the environment, then apply all three fixes.
